channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Ex Sanguis launches in Early Access on May 21
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Expected to remain in Early Access for at least six months.

Turn-based strategy game Ex Sanguis will launch in Early Access for PC via Steam on May 21, publisher Firesquid and developer Lightbulb Crew announced.

The Early Access version will be fully playable and includes the core gameplay features, offering several hours of content to enjoy. The full relapse will feature additional content, improved balance, new features, overall polish, and possibly new game modes. The game is expected to say in Early Access for at least six months, but that timeline may change based on player feedback and development progress.

Here is an overview of the game, via Firesquid:

About

Rise to answer the Mater’s final plea and lead your Stillae, elite warriors, echoes of the divinity’s last hope, as you fight to save a dying world a dying world from the forces of Stasis and restore the flow of life!

Your Perfect Plan

Plan your next moves with dynamic turn-based combat, strategically triggering epic chains of events across the battlefield:

  • Use Timeline Effects to speed up, delay or swap time position to impact turn order and outsmart your enemies.
  • Play with your surroundings that can explode, ignite enemies, or block sight… changing the outcome of the battles
  • Leverage physical effects like knock backs, forced facings, flanking bonuses, and damage-over-time to dominate every encounter.
  • Your team.

Progress at Your Pace

  • Choose your own path, your own difficulty through the map.
  • Take on high-risk, high-reward missions, head straight for boss encounters, or slow down to gather resources to increase your chance of success.
  • All missions contribute to gradual progress and reflect the type of experience you decide.

A Roguelite Loop Adapted to Turn-Based Combat

  • Adapt to random skill drops by combining them with your unique load outs generating different synergies.
  • Breeze through the procedural levels to beat unique bosses and understand the world in Stasia.
  • Even if you fail a mission, some progress is rewarded.

A Crimson Rebellion

In a world drained by the Purge, blood is defiance. Each drop of it paints the world in reds and blacks, as a reminder that life fights back. This is not just violence, it’s a vivid rebellion in a pale, colorless world.

Watch a new trailer below.

Early Access Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/ex-sanguis-launches-in-early-access-on-may-21
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: NEEDY STREAMER OVERLOAD PS5 physical ‘Subscriber Edition’ announced
item.content:encoded:
Serenity Forge will release a physical “Subscriber Edition” of NEEDY STREAMER OVERLOAD for PlayStation 5, the distrubor announced. Pre-orders are available now at retailers like VGP and Serenity Forge’s online store for $49.99. It will ship in Q3 2026.

The PlayStation 5 release follows Serenity Forge’s previous “Premium Edition” and “Collector’s Edition” releases for Switch.

NEEDY STREAMER OVERLOAD is currently available digitally for PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, Switch, and PC via Steam.

Here is an overview of the game and Subscriber Edition contents:

About

Turn “Ame”—somewhat of a hot mess of a girl—into an OMGWTF-cute internet angel and jumpstart her career as a live streamer for the most hardcore nerds online! NEEDY STREAMER OVERLOAD is a “multi-ending adventure game” depicting your daily life with “OMGkawaiiAngel,” a young girl with a rather extreme need for approval attempting to become the #1 “Internet Angel” (streamer). Gradually build up OMGkawaiiAngel’s number of followers as she spends her days streaming, using various “stress relievers,” and generally being kinda messed up. Experience all the different crazy ups and downs (like rock bottom!) and find out for yourself whether this story is even capable of having a happy ending.

Key Features

  • Offer daily commentary and guidance to help foster Ame into a top-tier streamer, so she can squeeze stupid amounts of Super Chat out of her donation-happy otaku followers.
  • Do all kinds of things from afternoon to evening to find out hot topics for streaming at night. Take Ame on dates, serve her up a little bit of naughtiness once in a while, provide her with a little something-something to take the edge off when she needs to release some pent-up stress, and use social media to grumble about things to help keep her happy and mentally healthy.
  • Reply back to Ame with stickers. Ignoring messages is not a human thing to do. Don’t make her angry.
  • Features multiple endings! Begin your adventure and see for yourself whether a happy ending is really even possible for a cute yet disturbed girl on the modern-day internet.

Subscriber Edition

  • A physical copy of the game for PlayStation 5
  • Interior case art
  • Soundtrack download card
  • Reversible chipboard standee
  • Glitter sticker sheet
  • Ame-chan slip cover (exclusive to this edition)
  • Soundtrack CD (exclusive to this edition)


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/needy-streamer-overload-ps5-physical-subscriber-edition-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Sci-fi drone 2D platformer Nullstar: Solus launches April 16 for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Xbox Series

A precision platformer where speed is of the essence.

Science-fiction drone 2D platformer Nullstar: Solus will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch, and PC via Steam on April 16 for $9.99, publisher indie.io and developer Smash Attack Studios announced.

“When we started Nullstar in mid 2024, it was a way for me to claw back some personal goals in game development,” said Smash Attack Studios team member Dean Baron in a press release. “I didn’t expect it to become this amazing journey where I was joined by incredible developers from all over the world. Nullstar is a love letter to games from all of us who worked on it and we are excited that it is now ready to be shared with world. Remember pilots. Be. Faster.”

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

In the distant future, mankind has discovered volatile sources of near-infinite energy, known as Nullstars. These mysterious anomalies can power entire planets, but are ticking time bombs that can wipe out entire worlds if they go critical. To this end, mega-corporations hire teams of archivists to find traces of lost worlds, to scavenge for the valuable remains of their nullstar. You are a scav drone pilot, sent into the orbit of a crippled megastructure to retrieve the treasure buried within.

Nullstar: Solus is a precision platformer where speed is everything. Hurtle through the forgotten, overgrown chambers and corridors of a megastructure, facing perilous environments and ancient security protocols in search of priceless nullstar fragments for your corporate overlords.

Key features

  • Pilot a fleet of drones into the depths of a labyrinth of steel and rust, explore the bones of a dead world and try to survive hostile environments and still-active security measures. Master your controls and environments to fly, drift, and ricochet your way to the top of global leaderboards.
  • Scav drones can navigate in any direction, but mastery of the Flight Path System is key to minimizing times. Turn off your thrusters selectively to maximize speed, and air-brake to drift around corners at impossible speeds.
  • Fast-paced, reactive gameplay that’s approachable but challenging to master. Be swift, think fast, set records, challenge rivals, then break their records again. As you improve, you’ll be able to decrypt intercepted flight logs to learn more about the world and your fellow pilots.
  • Conquer 100 levels spread across five game worlds. Progress through the ruins of an ancient world still in the process of being reclaimed by the nature it replaced, packed with evolving challenges, new dangers, and beautiful environments to explore.
  • All 100 levels have been hand-crafted with unique features, challenges, and multiple approaches; set in a detailed, atmospheric pixel-art world, and backed by a dark soundtrack featuring Amelia Jones (Hollow Knight) and Mariya Anastasova (Baldur’s Gate III).

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/sci-fi-drone-2d-platformer-nullstar-solus-launches-april-16-for-ps5-xbox-series-switch-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Sony Interactive Entertainment acquires Cinemersive Labs
item.content:encoded:
• PlayStation

Company to contribute to PlayStation's broader efforts in "advancing state of the art visual computing" within games,

Sony Interactive Entertainment has acquired Cinemersive Labs, a United Kingdom-based machine learning and computer vision company founded in 2022, the PlayStation manufacturer announced.

Cinemersive Labs, “a specialized team with deep expertise in computer vision and machine learning,” will join Sony Interactive Entertainment’s Visual Computing Group and contribute to the company’s broader efforts in “advancing state of the art visual computing” within games, including “applying machine learning to enhance gameplay visuals, improve rendering techniques, and unlock new levels of visual fidelity for players.”



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/sony-interactive-entertainment-acquires-cinemersive-labs
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
